package.name: pto_controller
package.description:
Pluggable PTO control strategy framework for the ROS2 HIL Dynamometer.
Implements multiple WEC PTO control strategies (passive damping, optimal passive, reactive, latching, declutching) behind a common PtoStrategyBase interface. The active strategy is selected via the `strategy` ROS parameter, enabling runtime comparison on the same hardware with identical wave inputs.
Reference: Ringwood, J.V. et al. (2014). IEEE Control Systems, 34(5), 30–55.
